title: Grill Queue — locked answers + open questions
bodyText:
Running brainstorm ledger. **Locked answers are canon (folded into their home notes). Open questions are where the next brainstorm resumes.**

# Locked (folded in) — through 2026-07-10
- **RESTRUCTURE ADOPTED** → [[arc-chapter-1]]: [[eilistraee]] is in the cult pool (Ch-1 climax = free HER; [[pc-varen|Varen]] A-plot; she emerges free-but-dim); **[[lathander]] is in a DIFFERENT pool, maybe topside** (Ch-2 god-hunt, sun returns then); **[[pc-eddy|Eddy]] can't truly reconnect until the Lathander pool** — true escape = all three layers reunited at the god's own node, purging him from every pool at once.
- **Pool lifecycle + network rules** → [[the-pool]] (couriers sync blueprints; true escape purges everywhere; gods can't scatter; virus-like/not smart; contain-don't-kill; still water = large pool).
- **Eddy endgame mechanics** → [[pc-eddy]] (Lathander reclaims the body; Jake keeps **mind (Eddy) or soul (Silus)**, the other dies — at Lathander's pool, Ch 2; cult pool gives revelation, not resolution).
- **Kol: knows and serves anyway** → [[pool-wizard]]. **Cultists = the faithful, half-taken.**
- **Elvish researcher = [[thundrak-durn|Thundrak Dûrn]] slave-scholar** → [[eekso]]/[[thundrak-durn]] ("that is lore now"). **[[pc-felson|Felson]]'s bottle = testable courier-fragments** → [[the-pool]].
- **Tone:** bittersweet dawn WITH dread underneath. **S25 recap** → [[session-25]].

# Open questions (resume here)
- [ ] **S27 prep (session 2026-07-30): the recap** — write a good cold-open recap of S26 (party walks into the two-mimic ambush; journal still unfired, Job's loot TBD, Felsen's blood hook live).
- [ ] **Next teaser (the intro "poem")** — theme candidates from Wes: **a martyr, a sacrifice, or a false idol**. Same shape as The Priest's Descent: AABB couplets, plain words, sensory hits, no fancy prose. Players aren't tracking these yet — they're seeds Wes plants for himself; eventually they'll see the pattern. Claude: bring drafts to the next prep session.
- [ ] **Re-score 7 scenes after the music purge (2026-07-23)** — all non-Spotify music got trashed; these scenes still point at trashed tracks (they'll play, but they're culled duds). Rebuild each palette from the Spotify library: **art room** (horror-intense-stalker-strings), **pitfall prison** (horror-walking), **ritual** (requiem-choral), **drowned halls** (forgotten-tomb, horror-atmosphere, cave-exploration, mystery-exploration), **gates** (chase, anticipation), **scholar's archive** (mysterious-piano, horror-atmosphere, somber-what-is-left), **webs in the dark** (battle-theme-a). New "mystery" playlist is a likely source for drowned halls / scholar's archive.
- [ ] **Gold sink (Wes, 2026-07-21)** — the party has THOUSANDS of gp and nowhere to spend it, so gold rewards are mostly irrelevant right now. Idea on the table: build a **gambling thing** somewhere for them to blow money on. Until then, keep treasure item-first, coin as flavor.
- [ ] **Eilistraee's release mechanism** — now THE Ch-1 climax design. On the table: the mark as her handhold; **Varen's portent/divination as the key** ("seeing possibilities and choosing"); a real **sacrifice** (David wants an earned theatrical death — but is the full price right for Ch 1 when she's the A-plot?); outside aid. Also: what do Kol and [[lolth]]'s drow DO during the release?
- [x] **The second roar — LOCKED 2026-07-21:** just some other crazy beast of the deep, nothing to do with Eekso. Possibly a **young dragon** out there — parked as future encounter material. It never enters the fortress.
- [x] **IT CONSUMES — LOCKED 2026-07-21:** refers to [[the-pool]]. The shed researcher was specifically studying the pool; he's long gone and has nothing to do with Eekso. It's a hint, not a thread.
- [ ] **Eekso + dungeon crawl design** — dedicated prep session ([[eekso]]). Slave-scholar research placement; bottle-testing beats; drow stalkers inside.
- [ ] **S24 actuals** — [[session-24]] still holds only prep; what fired and how? (Squeeze? Rothe grotto? Whispering Pool reflections?)
- [ ] **Leliana** — is she in the cult pool or Lathander's pool? Her state (guide / price / gone) — was flagged "save for later."
- [ ] **Lolth–Kol deal** (liked, not locked) — and what Lolth does when Eilistraee actually walks out.
- [ ] **Kol's inner want** (parked): "keeps something he loves preserved inside" → Trista? What does he do when the party threatens [[the-pool|the pool]] that holds her?
- [ ] **What Eddy gets at the cult pool** — revelation beats to design: communion shape, how much trinity truth lands, what the false-Torm/Kol confrontation shows him.
- [ ] Earlier parking lot: how Lathander got trapped (ties to the Event), the nature god's identity, the real name for "the Event", impostor-[[torm|Torm]]'s identity (Ch 2), **Kyle's new PC** (~2–3 sessions out!), [[kennarea|Kena]]'s "light the beacons" beat.

# Threads
[[the-pool]] · [[pool-wizard]] · [[pc-eddy]] · [[arc-chapter-1]] · [[eilistraee]] · [[lathander]] · [[session-25]] · [[eekso]]
